sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67244" key="metriolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετριο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speaking moderately</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
